terms.definition: A boat - a small vessel that floats on water. In the poem, children make boats from paper (कागज़ की नाव) to float in rainwater.
terms.exampleUsage: बच्चों ने कागज़ की नाव बनाकर पानी में तैराई। (The children made a paper boat and floated it in water.)

terms.definition: Paper - a thin material used for writing, drawing, and in this poem, for making boats. Children fold paper into boat shapes to float in water.
terms.exampleUsage: इस कागज़ से नाव बनाओ। (Make a boat from this paper.)

terms.definition: Rain - water falling from clouds. The rainy season brings puddles and streams where children float their paper boats. Also called वर्षा (varsha) in formal Hindi.
terms.exampleUsage: बारिश में कागज़ की नाव तैराना बहुत मज़ेदार है। (Floating paper boats in the rain is very fun.)

terms.definition: To float or to swim. In the poem, the paper boat floats (तैरती है) on the water. Things that are light like paper can float on water.
terms.exampleUsage: नाव पानी पर तैर रही है। (The boat is floating on water.)

terms.definition: A poem - a piece of writing that uses rhythm, rhyme, and beautiful language to express feelings and ideas. This chapter is a kavita (poem), not a kahani (story).
terms.exampleUsage: यह कविता बारिश और नाव के बारे में है। (This poem is about rain and boats.)

terms.definition: Rhyming - when words at the end of lines in a poem have matching sounds. Tukbandi makes poems musical and easy to remember.
terms.exampleUsage: इस कविता में बहुत अच्छी तुकबंदी है। (This poem has very good rhyming.)

terms.definition: Imagination - the ability to create pictures and ideas in your mind. In the poem, children imagine their paper boats going on grand adventures across rivers and seas.
terms.exampleUsage: कल्पना से बच्चे कागज़ की नाव को दूर देशों में भेजते हैं। (With imagination, children send the paper boat to distant lands.)

terms.definition: A stream or flow of water. When it rains, water collects and flows in small streams (धारा) on the ground. Children float their boats in these streams.
terms.exampleUsage: बारिश के पानी की धारा में नाव बह गई। (The boat floated away in the stream of rainwater.)

terms.definition: Season or weather. India has different mausam including गर्मी (summer), बारिश/बरसात (rainy season), सर्दी (winter). Paper boats are a rainy season (बरसात) activity.
terms.exampleUsage: बारिश का मौसम नाव बनाने के लिए सबसे अच्छा है। (The rainy season is the best time for making boats.)

terms.definition: Wind or breeze. In the poem, the wind (हवा) helps push the paper boat along the water, making it sail forward on its journey.
terms.exampleUsage: हवा ने नाव को आगे बढ़ाया। (The wind pushed the boat forward.)
